title: Varko (Human)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Varko}} {{Character |type=Sith Empire |image=[[File:Admiralvarko.jpg]] |name=Varko |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Bald |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |skin=Dark |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] **[[Sith armada (Jedi Civil War)|Sith armada]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Lord Malak, our preparations are nearly complete.|Varko, to Darth Malak|}} '''Varko''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] for [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[3956 BBY|final year]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He assumed [[Saul Karath]]'s position as Malak's second-in-command when Karath was [[Skirmish aboard the Leviathan|slain]] by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Carth Onasi]] and two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Bastila Shan]] and [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], aboard the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']], Malak's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. Shortly after Varko reported on the status of the [[Star Forge]], the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] fueling the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Empire's war effort, Malak was slain by the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|redeemed]] Jedi Revan, and the Empire which Varko served was [[Battle of Rakata Prime|defeated]] at [[Lehon/Legends|Rakata Prime]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Everyday the Star Forge adds more ships to our fleet, it is operating at nearly 300% of our projections. The fleet is assembling around the Star Forge, and awaits your instructions.''"
"''Patience, Commander. My new apprentice is nearly ready. Once Bastila joins her Battle Meditation to our enormous fleet, we shall be invincible. Then we shall begin our final conquest of the Core Worlds, and the Republic will be crushed forever.|Varko and Darth Malak|}} [[File:Malak_Jawless.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Varko discussed the Star Forge's status as Darth Malak had his cybernetic jaw casing removed briefly.]] During the [[Jedi Civil War]], a conflict between the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Varko served the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] as an [[Sith officer|officer]] in the Empire's [[Navy/Legends|Navy]], rising to the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] by [[3956 BBY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' took place in [[3956 BBY]]. During the events of the game Varko is promoted to [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] of the [[Sith armada (Jedi Civil War)|Sith armada]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Admiral [[Saul Karath]]. The ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' establishes that Saul Karath defected to the Sith Armada in [[3958 BBY]] and that after the defeat of [[Darth Malak]] in ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'' the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] that Varko served in fragmented and collapsed. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Varko was promoted to second-in-command of the Sith armada, after his predecessor, [[Saul Karath]], was [[Skirmish aboard the Leviathan|killed]] by two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]—[[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Bastila Shan]]—and the Republic [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Carth Onasi]] aboard [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']]. The position put Varko next in line to command the Empire after Malak. Sometime later aboard the [[Star Forge]], the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that was fueling the Sith war effort, Varko informed Darth Malak that the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] was operating at 300% of the Sith's projections. After the Admiral advised Malak that the Sith [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] had regrouped to the Star Forge and was awaiting the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] instructions, Malak revealed his plan to use Shan, whom he had captured and turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], to focus her [[Force power/Legends|power]] with [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] against the Republic, eventually conquering the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Varko was then dismissed by the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]]. Shortly after that, Malak was slain by the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|redeemed]] Jedi [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] Revan, and his Sith Empire was [[Battle of Rakata Prime|defeated]] by the Republic at [[Lehon/Legends|Rakata Prime]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|As you wish, Lord Malak.|Varko|}} Varko was a Human male who, after assuming control over the Sith armada, made it a point to inform Darth Malak of the status of both the Star Forge and the fleet. During his conversation with Malak, the Dark Lord noted his impatience. Varko was momentarily startled when Malak revealed his lack of a jaw, which was normally covered by a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] jaw casing. However, that did not prevent him from saluting Malak after the conversation's end. Before the events of the Sith Empire's defeat, Varko was balding; the [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that he did possess was [[Color/Legends|gray]] in color. He had brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and was dark-skinned in appearance. ==Equipment== Varko wore a gray Sith [[Officer/Legends|officer's]] uniform that included gray [[Glove/Legends|gloves]] with a black [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]], black [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and black [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldrons]]. ==Behind the scenes== Varko appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. Although not stated in-game, Varko's name was revealed if the player reads the dialogue box after the cutscene in which Varko appears. In-game, Varko is referred to as a commander by Darth Malak; however, the dialogue box showed that the character was an admiral. This article treats the latter reference as the correct one. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] of the [[Sith armada (Jedi Civil War)|Sith armada]] |years=[[3956 BBY]] |before=[[Saul Karath]] |before-years=[[3958 BBY]]–[[3956 BBY]] |after=None |after-years=}} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Varko (humano) |nl=Varko |fi=Varko }} [[Category:Admirals and generals of Revan's Sith Empire]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
